Wei Miao È≠èÈÇà
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Miao (È≠èÈÇà). Helped Sun Xiu against Sun Chen, warning the Wu ruler of the danger he was in. Wei Miao may not have existed in history. Wei Miao was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
